ast.name: error
ast.source: No Intl support, please use an Intl polyfill!
ast.target: 不支持 Intl，请使用 Intl polyfill！

ast.name: info
ast.source: 🌐 i18next is made possible by our own product, Locize — consider powering your project with managed localization (AI, CDN, integrations): https://locize.com 💙
ast.target: 🌐 i18next 得益于我们自己的产品 Locize — 考虑使用托管本地化（AI、CDN、集成）为您的项目提供支持：https://locize.com 💙

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 Insta TOC 插件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The global heading level for the Table of Contents title.
ast.target: 目录标题的全局标题级别。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the global list bullet type.
ast.target: 选择全局列表项目符号类型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The delay for each ToC update.
ast.target: 每次目录更新的延迟时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The global title for the Table of Contents.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 添加要全局排除的标题文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add heading levels (1–6) to exclude globally.
ast.target: 添加要全局排除的标题级别（1–6）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add characters to strip from headings globally.
ast.target: 添加要从标题中全局剥离的字符。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Instance method `debug.destroy()` is deprecated and no longer does anything. It will be removed in the next major version of `debug`.
ast.target: 实例方法 `debug.destroy()` 已弃用且不再执行任何操作。它将在 `debug` 的下一个主要版本中移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 正在访问一个对象 - 但未启用 returnObjects 选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Seems the loaded translations were in flat JSON format instead of nested. Either set keySeparator: false on init or make sure your translations are published in nested format.
ast.target: 似乎加载的翻译是扁平 JSON 格式而非嵌套格式。请在初始化时设置 keySeparator: false，或确保您的翻译以嵌套格式发布。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着您的设置中存在错误。您在 i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage 完成之前访问了 t 函数。请等待回调或 Promise 解析后再访问它！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 未通过 i18next.use 添加后端。将不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: 初始化：未使用 languageDetector 且未定义 lng

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: 初始化：i18next 已经初始化。您应该只调用 init 一次！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hasLoadedNamespace: i18n.languages were undefined or empty

ast.name: warn
ast.source: I18N was not initialized, initializing default obsidian-dev-utils translations
ast.target: I18N 未初始化，正在初始化默认的 obsidian-dev-utils 翻译

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unable to determine view state for TOC update.
ast.target: 无法确定用于目录更新的视图状态。

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] select_multiple_invalid_value
%cThe `value` property of a `<select multiple>` element should be an array, but it received a non-array value. The selection will be kept as is.
https://svelte.dev/e/select_multiple_invalid_value
ast.target: %c[svelte] select_multiple_invalid_value\n%c`<select multiple>` 元素的 `value` 属性应为数组，但它收到了一个非数组值。选择将保持原样。\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/select_multiple_invalid_value

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是一个组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to save. Check console for details.
ast.target: 保存失败。请检查控制台获取详细信息。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Level must be an integer from 1 to 6.
ast.target: 级别必须是 1 到 6 之间的整数。
